input: This cluster study covers two interconnection requests sharing a point of interconnection. Request A is Saguaro Solar, a 150 MW photovoltaic project (queue Q-880) interconnecting at the Pinal 115 kV substation in CAISO. Request B is an unrelated 90 MW standalone battery project. Saguaro Solar's facilities study is complete, with network upgrades estimated at $3,500,000.
